title: ShuiShui's Special Day
subtitle: 六一这天,妈妈和姥姥陪水水逛玩具店的特别一天
theme: 勇敢面对小病痛，感受家人的陪伴
moral: 计划变了也没关系，有爱的人陪着，平凡的一天也会变得特别。

pages.narration: 六一儿童节的早上，阳光照进客厅。水水窝在沙发上，耳朵软软的，今天有一点不舒服。

dialogue.speaker: mama
dialogue.text: 水水今天先在家休息，不去幼儿园啦。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 嗯……我有一点点没力气。

pages.composition_hint: shuishui resting on a sofa under a soft blanket, mama standing nearby in a yellow flower dress, warm sunny living room with pillows and plants.

pages.narration: 妈妈端来小药水，味道有一点怪。水水皱皱鼻子，还是一小口一小口喝完了。

dialogue.speaker: mama
dialogue.text: 哭没有用，哭不解决问题，我们来想个办法。喝完我们贴一张勇敢小贴纸。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 我可以自己喝。

pages.composition_hint: shuishui holding a tiny measuring cup with both paws, mama watching with a gentle smile, a warm water cup and a star sticker on the table.

pages.narration: 姥姥来了，白卷毛蓬蓬的，亚麻衫干干净净。她还给水水带来一条配好的小发带。

dialogue.speaker: laolao
dialogue.text: 我们水水真棒！今天不去学校，也可以过一个开心的节日。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 真的吗？

pages.composition_hint: close view of shuishui smiling softly while laolao the sheep holds a cute hairband, mama in a yellow flower dress standing beside them in a tidy entryway.

pages.narration: 妈妈和姥姥带水水去大融城商场。商场亮亮的，节日彩旗一排又一排。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 哇，好多灯！

dialogue.speaker: laolao
dialogue.text: 走，我们去看看你喜欢的玩具。

pages.composition_hint: shuishui, mama, and laolao walking through a bright modern shopping mall atrium with colorful Children's Day banners, glass escalators, and cheerful shop lights.

pages.narration: 玩具店里，玩具好多好多。水水先走到毛绒玩具区，摸摸小熊，又看看小猫。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 它们都软软的。

dialogue.speaker: mama
dialogue.text: 可以慢慢看，想好了再选。

pages.composition_hint: shuishui walking along shelves filled with plush bears and plush cats, mama and laolao watching nearby, colorful toy store aisles in the background.

pages.narration: 水水看了半天，轻轻摇摇头。家里已经有好多毛绒朋友啦，今天不选毛绒玩具。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 它们很可爱，可是我没有特别想带回家。

dialogue.speaker: mama
dialogue.text: 你会自己想一想，真好。

pages.composition_hint: close view of shuishui gently shaking her head beside a shelf of plush toys, mama smiling beside a shopping basket in a bright toy aisle.

pages.narration: 忽然，水水看见一个小兔子钥匙扣。小小的耳朵，圆圆的脸，挂在亮晶晶的架子上。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 这个像我！我想选它。

pages.composition_hint: extreme close view of shuishui reaching toward a tiny white rabbit keychain hanging on a shiny metal display rack with colorful charms.

pages.narration: 接着，水水找到一盒粉色的水晶泥。盒子透明透明的，里面像一团粉粉的云。

dialogue.speaker: laolao
dialogue.text: 这个颜色跟今天的小发带很搭呢。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 粉粉的，我喜欢！

pages.composition_hint: shuishui holding a clear box of pink slime that looks soft and glossy, laolao the sheep in a linen shirt holding a matching hairband beside a toy display table.

pages.narration: 最后，水水看见一个粉色双层小推车玩具。上面一层可以放小玩具，下面一层也可以放小玩具。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 它可以推来推去，还能装好多东西！

dialogue.speaker: mama
dialogue.text: 那我们把三样一起放进篮子吧。

pages.composition_hint: close view of shuishui placing a pink two-tier toy shopping cart into a basket with a rabbit keychain and a clear pink slime box, mama and laolao standing nearby.

pages.narration: 买好玩具，水水的肚子咕噜咕噜叫。妈妈和姥姥带她去吃最喜欢的炸鸡翅和小汉堡。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 香香的味道跑到我鼻子里啦！

pages.composition_hint: shuishui, mama, and laolao sitting at a bright mall restaurant table with crispy chicken wings, small burgers, napkins, and a tray.

pages.narration: 水水咬一口小汉堡，又啃一口鸡翅。她的眼睛弯弯的，心里也热乎乎的。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 今天好好吃，也好好玩！

dialogue.speaker: laolao
dialogue.text: 慢慢吃，开心就好。

pages.composition_hint: close view of shuishui smiling with a small burger on a plate and crispy chicken wings nearby, laolao the sheep sitting across the table with a happy expression.

pages.narration: 这个儿童节，水水没有去幼儿园。可是有妈妈和姥姥陪着，她发现，特别的一天也可以从一个小小的勇敢开始。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 我今天喝了小药水，还自己选了玩具。

dialogue.speaker: mama
dialogue.text: 是呀，勇敢的水水，节日快乐。

pages.composition_hint: shuishui holding a shopping bag with a rabbit keychain, clear pink slime box, and pink two-tier toy cart visible, mama and laolao standing with her in a cozy mall seating area.
